2022లో ఆలోపతిక్ అవుట్‌పేషెంట్ హాజరును నమోదు చేసిన, కానీ 2021లో అటువంటి హాజరు లేని ఉపజిల్లాలను గుర్తించండి.
gold_sql: SELECT T1.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME FROM DIM_SUB_DISTRICT AS T1 JOIN FACT_OUTPATIENT_SERVICES AS T2 ON T1.SUB_DISTRICT_ID = T2.SUB_DISTRICT_ID JOIN DIM_MONTH AS T3 ON T2.MONTH_ID = T3.MONTH_ID JOIN DIM_YEAR AS T4 ON T3.YEAR_ID = T4.YEAR_ID WHERE T4.YEAR_VALUE = '2022' AND T2.OUTPATIENT_ATTENDANCE_ALLOPATHIC > 0.0 GROUP BY T1.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME EXCEPT SELECT T1.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME FROM DIM_SUB_DISTRICT AS T1 JOIN FACT_OUTPATIENT_SERVICES AS T2 ON T1.SUB_DISTRICT_ID = T2.SUB_DISTRICT_ID JOIN DIM_MONTH AS T3 ON T2.MONTH_ID = T3.MONTH_ID JOIN DIM_YEAR AS T4 ON T3.YEAR_ID = T4.YEAR_ID WHERE T4.YEAR_VALUE = '2021' AND T2.OUTPATIENT_ATTENDANCE_ALLOPATHIC > 0.0 GROUP BY T1.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME
predicted_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT sd.sub_district_name
FROM dim_sub_district sd
WHERE EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM fact_outpatient_services fos
    JOIN dim_month m ON fos.month_id = m.month_id
    JOIN dim_year y ON m.year_id = y.year_id
    WHERE fos.sub_district_id = sd.sub_district_id
      AND y.year_value = 2022
      AND fos.outpatient_attendance_allopathic > 0
)
AND NOT EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM fact_outpatient_services fos2
    JOIN dim_month m2 ON fos2.month_id = m2.month_id
    JOIN dim_year y2 ON m2.year_id = y2.year_id
    WHERE fos2.sub_district_id = sd.sub_district_id
      AND y2.year_value = 2021
      AND fos2.outpatient_attendance_allopathic > 0
);

question:
ఈ ప్రశ్నను అనువదించండి:
2021 సంవత్సరంలో నమోదైన అన్ని అలోపతి బయటి రోగుల సందర్శనల మొత్తం సంఖ్య ఆధారంగా, ఉపజిల్లాలు మరియు వాటి ప్రాంతాల రకాలను అత్యధిక హాజరు నుండి ప్రారంభించి ర్యాంక్ చేయండి.
gold_sql: SELECT T1.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME, T1.TYPE_OF_AREA, SUM(T2.OUTPATIENT_ATTENDANCE_ALLOPATHIC) FROM DIM_SUB_DISTRICT AS T1 JOIN FACT_OUTPATIENT_SERVICES AS T2 ON T1.SUB_DISTRICT_ID = T2.SUB_DISTRICT_ID JOIN DIM_MONTH AS T3 ON T2.MONTH_ID = T3.MONTH_ID JOIN DIM_YEAR AS T4 ON T3.YEAR_ID = T4.YEAR_ID WHERE T4.YEAR_VALUE = '2021' GROUP BY T1.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME, T1.TYPE_OF_AREA ORDER BY SUM(T2.OUTPATIENT_ATTENDANCE_ALLOPATHIC) DESC
predicted_sql:
SELECT sd.sub_district_name, sd.type_of_area, SUM(fos.outpatient_attendance_allopathic) AS total_attendance
FROM fact_outpatient_services fos
JOIN dim_sub_district sd ON fos.sub_district_id = sd.sub_district_id
JOIN dim_month dm ON fos.month_id = dm.month_id
JOIN dim_year dy ON dm.year_id = dy.year_id
WHERE dy.year_value = 2021
GROUP BY sd.sub_district_name, sd.type_of_area
ORDER BY total_attendance DESC;
raw_output:

ORDER BY total_attendance DESC;
